notes: Pinned OCI SDK contract: CreateApiPlatformInstance, GetApiPlatformInstance, ListApiPlatformInstances, UpdateApiPlatformInstance, DeleteApiPlatformInstance, and ChangeApiPlatformInstanceCompartment are present in v65.110.0. Create returns an ApiPlatformInstance body plus opc-work-request-id, update returns only the resource body, and delete returns the async work-request header without a body.
Pinned provider coverage from the onboarding audit maps the published resource to oci_api_platform_api_platform_instance and the list datasource to oci_api_platform_api_platform_instances.

Repo-authored runtime contract is intentionally narrower than the imported provider surface: generatedruntime publishes in-place updates only for description, freeformTags, and definedTags. ChangeApiPlatformInstanceCompartment remains out of scope, so compartmentId and name stay replacement-only in the checked-in runtime semantics.

Repo-authored bind-versus-create stays explicit: pre-create lookup uses exact compartmentId plus name matching, restricts reuse to ACTIVE, CREATING, or UPDATING candidates, and rejects duplicate exact-name matches instead of guessing.

Create and delete responses expose opc-work-request-id, but the published apiplatform surface does not expose service-local work-request readers. The reviewed generatedruntime path records request and work-request breadcrumbs when OCI returns them and relies on lifecycle projection plus confirm-delete rereads rather than work-request polling.
